name: Esso (Thailand) Public Company Limited
summary: Esso (Thailand) Public Company Limited refines and markets petroleum products in Thailand and internationally. It operates in two segments, Downstream and Petrochemicals. The company provides refined petroleum products, including motor gasoline, gasohol, diesel, aviation fuels, fuel oil, marine fuels, and LPG products; and other petroleum products comprising mineral and synthetic lubricants under the Mobil brand name, as well as asphalt. It offers its refined petroleum products through a retail network of 654 retail service stations under the Esso brand name; and commercial channel consists of sales to industrial end users and wholesalers, as well as to customers in the aviation and marine industries. The company also produces aromatics in the form of Paraxylene, a feedstock for purified terephthalic acid, as well as used as raw material for producing polyester films, packaging resins, and fabrics. In addition, it provides hydrocarbon solvents, such as hexane, which is used primarily in edible oil seed extractions and as a carrier in petrochemical production; rubber solvents that are used as adhesives and rubber cement for manufacturing of tires; white spirits for coating and paint industries; and Exxsol D80 for household, industrial, and metal working applications. Further, the company imports and markets aromatic solvents that are used in the automotive paint coating industry; and sells plasticizer for various applications. Additionally, it leases real estate properties. The company was formerly known as Esso Standard Thailand Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Esso (Thailand) Public Company Limited in 1996. The company was founded in 1894 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand. Esso (Thailand) Public Company Limited is a subsidiary of ExxonMobil Asia Holding Private Limited.
